runner_role: Codex agent executes one loop iteration per request unless the user asks for continuous progress.

commands.name: status
commands.effect: Read loop.json, queue.json and state.json; report current unit, completed units and next unit.

commands.name: run-one
commands.effect: Execute one full iteration for state.current_unit, write outputs, write run log, update state.

commands.name: pause
commands.effect: Set state.status to paused and record reason.

commands.name: resume
commands.effect: Set state.status to active and continue from state.current_unit.

after_success: write or update output summary under outputs/
advance state.current_unit to next uncompleted queue unit
after_blocked: pause loop if pause_conditions are met
